title: BEM-851 validate protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:08 (UTC+3)'
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_AGREED_PROTOCOL_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
txt=protocol.read_text(errors='ignore') if protocol.exists() else ''
up=txt.upper()
checks=[
 {'name':'protocol_exists','pass':protocol.exists()},
 {'name':'has_claude_response_marker','pass':'CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up},
 {'name':'has_decision','pass':'DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up)},
 {'name':'not_runtime_blocker','pass':'NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' not in up and 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' not in up},
 {'name':'has_source','pass':'Source:' in txt},
]
failed=[c for c in checks if not c['pass']]
if not failed:
    status='agreed_protocol_validated'
    next_action='prepare concise operator report and continue roadmap implementation from protocol'
else:
    status='agreed_protocol_needs_repair'
    next_action='repair protocol source/decision/marker gaps before implementation'
state={'bem':'BEM-851','status':status,'checks':checks,'failed':failed,'protocol_path':str(protocol),'preview':txt[:1200],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem851_validate_agreed_protocol.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem851_validate_agreed_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-851 | Validate Agreed Protocol | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-851'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Protocol: '+str(protocol)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem851_validate_agreed_protocol.json','governance/reports/bem851_validate_agreed_protocol.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Validated BEM-850 agreed protocol for real Claude response marker, decision, source and non-blocker status')
"""
No issue comments.
